## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs or comments where useful.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local database files, `.env` values, or build artifacts.
- [ ] I considered behavior without Google Calendar/Tasks configured.
